topics.title: Goodfellas Film and Immigration Policy
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding the cast and plot of the film Goodfellas before transitioning into a debate over illegal immigration policies and the complexities of guest worker programs.

topics.title: Immigration Labor and Charity Hypocrisy
topics.summary: The studio discusses the economic impact of undocumented labor, the perceived hypocrisy of Joel Hollander’s charitable work for SIDS in light of his legal disputes with former colleagues, and a guest's transition from being a radio DJ.

topics.title: Radio Career Transitions and Extraterrestrial Life Forms
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the automation of radio stations, the transition from local broadcasting to other careers, and an interview with Riley Martin concerning various extraterrestrial life forms and their physical characteristics.

topics.title: Time Magazine Influential People List
topics.summary: The studio discusses the varying styles of celebrity profiles in Time magazine, specifically comparing David Spade's understated write-up of Howard Stern to more glowing tributes for other celebrities.

topics.title: Response to Allegations of Infidelity
topics.summary: The studio addresses a newspaper report from the Hartford Current claiming that Howard Stern pursued a woman named Mary Jones while he was married and working in Hartford.

topics.title: Allegations of Infidelity and Stripper Charity Debate
topics.summary: The studio addresses a woman's claims regarding past interactions with the host while also debating the merits of a charity aimed at helping strippers transition out of the industry.

topics.title: Charity for Strippers
topics.summary: The studio features a woman who describes her organization's mission to provide financial assistance and education to strippers seeking to transition out of the industry.

topics.title: Time Magazine's Influence List
topics.summary: The studio discusses the inclusion of Howard Stern on Time Magazine's list of influential people and critiques the selection of other figures like Tyra Banks and Pope Benedict XVI.

topics.title: Media Influence and Celebrity Scandals
topics.summary: The studio explores the impact of media influence on celebrity status, critiques various entertainment news stories involving figures like Bob Dylan and Denise Richards, and discusses public appearances by television personalities.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Listener Feedback
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including celebrity relationships, listener feedback regarding the show's content, and humorous interactions with callers.

topics.title: Radio Show News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming segments including a report on David Blaine, an interview with a local personality, and commentary on celebrity relationships involving Heather Locklear and Denise Richards.

topics.title: American Idol Contestants and Marriage Phobias
topics.summary: The studio discusses the quality of American Idol contestants, the odds of winning, and a book regarding men's reluctance to marry.

topics.title: The Dynamics and Fears of Marriage
topics.summary: The studio explores various male perspectives on marriage, including fears regarding loss of autonomy, the complexities of long-term relationships, and the practical considerations of children.

topics.title: FBI Surveillance and Media News
topics.summary: The studio covers topics ranging from FBI surveillance of anti-war groups and New Orleans evacuation plans to a lawsuit over workplace spankings, the death of Elma Farnsworth, and celebrity news involving Tom Cruise and David Blaine.
